street_brigand.name: Street Brigand
street_brigand.intro: A Street Brigand blocks the alley, eyeing your satchel of gold. Pick a companion to scare them off!
street_brigand.winText: Your companion sends the brigand fleeing! Heat cools and you pocket a stray coin.
street_brigand.loseText: The brigand snatches a handful of gold before bolting. Heat rises.

royal_turncoat.name: Royal Turncoat
royal_turncoat.intro: A Royal Turncoat — once loyal to the King — ambushes you with hired blades. Choose wisely!
royal_turncoat.winText: The turncoat is outwitted and retreats into the shadows. The trail goes quiet.
royal_turncoat.loseText: The turncoat escapes and spreads word of your hunt. Heat surges.

false_vizier.name: False Vizier
false_vizier.intro: The False Vizier, mastermind of the theft, confronts you with dark cunning. Everything rides on this!
false_vizier.winText: You unmask the False Vizier and seize a chest he hid! The pressure eases at last.
false_vizier.loseText: The Vizier slips away laughing, alerting every guard. Heat spikes dangerously.
